lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਭੂਤ ਸਚਿ ਭੈ ਰਤੇ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਚੀ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: panch bhoot sach bhai rate jot sachee man maeh |
lines.english: The body of the five elements is dyed in the Fear of the True One; the mind is filled with the True Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਉਗਣ ਵੀਸਰੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਪਤਿ ਤਾਹਿ ॥੪॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak aaugan veesare gur raakhe pat taeh |4|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, your demerits shall be forgotten; the Guru shall preserve your honor. ||4||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਜਾਵਹੀ ਪੂਰਿ ਭਰੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik aaveh ik jaavahee poor bhare ahankaar |
lines.english: Some come, and some go; they are totally filled with egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬੇੜੀ ਸਚ ਕੀ ਤਰੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak berree sach kee tareeai gur veechaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Boat of Truth will ferry you across; contemplate the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਉ ਤਰੀਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin kiau tareeai sukh hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, how can anyone swim across to find peace?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਮਤੀ ਬੂਡੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੁ ਤਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manahatth matee booddeeai guramukh sach su taar |1|
lines.english: Through stubborn-mindedness, the intellect is drowned; one who becomes Gurmukh and truthful is saved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਤੂ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakh too mai avar na doojaa koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As it pleases You, Lord, You save me. There is no other for me at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਦੇਖਉ ਡਉ ਜਲੈ ਪਾਛੈ ਹਰਿਓ ਅੰਗੂਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aagai dekhau ddau jalai paachhai hario angoor |
lines.english: In front of me, I see the jungle burning; behind me, I see green plants sprouting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੈ ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਚੁ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upajai tis te binasai ghatt ghatt sach bharapoor |
lines.english: We shall merge into the One from whom we came. The True One is pervading each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੀ ਸਾਚੈ ਮਹਲਿ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaavahee saachai mehal hadoor |2|
lines.english: He Himself unites us in Union with Himself; the True Mansion of His Presence is close at hand. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ਗਰਬੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਸਮੇਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man tan teraa too dhanee garab nivaar sameo |3|
lines.english: Mind and body are Yours; You are my Master. Please rid me of my pride, and let me merge with You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿ ਸਾਹਿ ਤੁਝੁ ਸੰਮਲਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: saeh saeh tujh samalaa kade na visaareo |
lines.english: With each and every breath, I dwell upon You; I shall never forget You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਸਾਹਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau saahab man vasai guramukh amrit peo |
lines.english: The more the Lord and Master dwells within the mind, the more the Gurmukh drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਕਰਿ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin ehu jagat upaaeaa tribhavan kar aakaar |
lines.english: The One who formed this universe created the creation of the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt jot nirantaree boojhai guramat saar |4|
lines.english: One who sees that Light within each and every heart understands the Essence of the Guru's Teachings. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh chaanan jaaneeai manamukh mugadh gubaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh knows the Divine Light, while the foolish self-willed manmukh gropes around in the darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੫॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam santokheea jeeo pindd prabh paas |5|16|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are contented with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. They offer their bodies and souls to God. ||5||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਲਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sache setee ral mile sache gun paragaas |
lines.english: They meet and merge with the True One. They become the Radiant Manifestation of the Excellence of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕੀਚੈ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jinee jaaniaa tin keechai saabaas |
lines.english: Those who understand are Gurmukh; recognize and applaud them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਮਿਲੁ ਵੇਲਾ ਹੈ ਏਹ ॥
lines.translit: sun man mitr piaariaa mil velaa hai eh |
lines.english: Listen, O my mind, my friend, my darling: now is the time to meet the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਸਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag joban saas hai tab lag ihu tan deh |
lines.english: As long as there is youth and breath, give this body to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਢਹਿ ਢੇਰੀ ਤਨੁ ਖੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin gun kaam na aavee dteh dteree tan kheh |1|
lines.english: Without virtue, it is useless; the body shall crumble into a pile of dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਲੈ ਲਾਹਾ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere man lai laahaa ghar jaeh |
lines.english: O my mind, earn the profit, before you return home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਨਿਵਰੀ ਭਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam salaaheeai haumai nivaree bhaeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh praises the Naam, and the fire of egotism is extinguished. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਗੰਢਣੁ ਗੰਢੀਐ ਲਿਖਿ ਪੜਿ ਬੁਝਹਿ ਭਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun gandtan gandteeai likh parr bujheh bhaar |
lines.english: Again and again, we hear and tell stories; we read and write and understand loads of knowledge,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਅਗਲੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa ahinis agalee haumai rog vikaar |
lines.english: but still, desires increase day and night, and the disease of egotism fills us with corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਜੇ ਕਰੀ ਲਖ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: lakh siaanap je karee lakh siau preet milaap |
lines.english: Even if someone has hundreds of thousands of clever mental tricks, and the love and company of hundreds of thousands of people

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਅਤੋਲਵਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ohu veparavaahu atolavaa guramat keemat saar |2|
lines.english: That Carefree Lord cannot be appraised; His Real Value is known only through the Wisdom of the Guru's Teachings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਅਰੇ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚੀਨੈ ਆਪੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har jap jeeare chhutteeai guramukh cheenai aap |3|
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, O my soul, you shall be emancipated; as Gurmukh, you shall come to understand your own self. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਨ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੀਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੂਖ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin sangat saadh na dhraapeea bin naavai dookh santaap |
lines.english: still, without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he will not feel satisfied. Without the Name, all suffer in sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਹਿ ਵੇਚਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਸਿਰੁ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan man gur peh vechiaa man deea sir naal |
lines.english: I have sold my body and mind to the Guru, and I have given my mind and head as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਢੰਢੋਲਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੋਜਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tribhavan khoj dtandtoliaa guramukh khoj nihaal |
lines.english: I was seeking and searching for Him throughout the three worlds; then, as Gurmukh, I sought and found Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੪॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: satagur mel milaaeaa naanak so prabh naal |4|17|
lines.english: The True Guru has united me in Union, O Nanak, with that God. ||4||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਹੀ ਲੇਖੈ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: too sarab jeea pratipaalahee lekhai saas giraas |
lines.english: You are the Cherisher of all beings; You keep the account of our breaths and morsels of food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੈ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਨਹੀ ਜੀਵਣ ਕੀ ਨਹੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: maranai kee chintaa nahee jeevan kee nahee aas |
lines.english: I have no anxiety about dying, and no hope of living.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਜਪਤ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeare raam japat man maan |
lines.english: O my soul, chant the Name of the Lord; the mind will be pleased and appeased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤੂ ਵਸਹਿ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਨਿਰਜਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: antar guramukh too vaseh jiau bhaavai tiau nirajaas |1|
lines.english: You abide within the Gurmukh. As it pleases You, You decide our allotment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਜਲਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar laagee jal bujhee paaeaa guramukh giaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The raging fire within is extinguished; the Gurmukh obtains spiritual wisdom. ||1||Pause||
